heroHeadline: Day 39: Anadolu Reports US Aircraft Losses; Istanbul Consulate Shooting Kills 3
heroSubtitle: Anadolu Agency details US military aircraft damage and attrition in Iran war operations; three killed in gun clash near Israeli consulate in Istanbul; US-Israeli strikes continue in northern Iran.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-07. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
